dashboard_title: The Risk Operations Control Center (ROCC) Dashboard

card_1.title: Telemetry Health Index
card_1.caption: Monitors system packet stability, highlighting a drop to 82.0% data completeness due to a combined 72 raw telemetry signal drops across the network.

card_2.title: False Positive Rate
card_2.caption: Tracks over-enforcement mistakes, flashing a critical 22.2% error rate as network packet drops disrupt model inputs and trigger false alarms on 10 safe merchant accounts.

card_3.title: Model Significance Status
card_3.caption: Confirms that the pipeline's improvements are statistically valid (p < 0.000001), backed by a clear 89-to-10 split in recovered violations that proves these results are not due to random chance.

module_a.caption: Cross-references hourly traffic volumes against packet loss spikes to pinpoint exact infrastructure bottlenecks, such as the 45% drop rate observed at 5:00 AM.

module_b.caption: Evaluates enforcement equity between proxy demographics, confirming the system safely clears the strict 0.80 regulatory floor to prevent systemic bias.

module_c.caption: Contrasts detection performance across business lines, showing a massive +52.0% accuracy recovery for high-entropy TikTok Shop profiles under active network stress.

module_d.caption: Maps daily merchant risk migrations, illustrating that the system runs smoothly by prioritizing preventative monitoring for 124 warning-tier accounts over immediate account blocks.
